pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 1

readAloudText.Wonder: Coco Cricket opens the tiny sky bakery as Button Moon rises like a glowing bun.
readAloudText.Explore: Coco Cricket unlocked the tiny sky bakery when the first star blinked. Above the roof, Button Moon rose round and golden, like a bun cooling on the sky.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 2

readAloudText.Drift: Luma notices the moon is dim.
readAloudText.Wonder: Luma Lamb notices Button Moon looks a little less shiny than usual.
readAloudText.Explore: Luma Lamb dusted flour from her wool and squinted upward. The moon was glowing, but not its usual warm bakery glow.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 3

readAloudText.Wonder: Nib Starling finds a basket of lost star-sprinkles by the window.
readAloudText.Explore: Nib Starling hopped to the window and found a tiny basket of star-sprinkles. They shimmered softly, as if waiting for a recipe.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 4

readAloudText.Wonder: The friends decide to bake a moon-muffin to cheer up the night.
readAloudText.Explore: Coco opened the recipe drawer. Luma warmed the mixing bowl. Nib puffed his chest. Tonight, they would bake something gentle for the sky.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 5

readAloudText.Wonder: Coco measures one spoonful of cricket-chirp sugar.
readAloudText.Explore: Coco measured one spoon of cricket-chirp sugar. It sounded like tiny bells when it touched the bowl.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 6

readAloudText.Wonder: Luma folds in a cloud of soft wool-flour.
readAloudText.Explore: Luma tipped in wool-flour, pale and soft. It drifted down like a quiet cloud and made the batter sigh.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 7

readAloudText.Wonder: Nib adds three star-sprinkles, saving the rest for later.
readAloudText.Explore: Nib wanted to pour them all. Instead, he counted carefully: one, two, three. The batter glowed just enough.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 8

readAloudText.Wonder: The oven hums a lullaby while the muffin rises slowly.
readAloudText.Explore: The little oven hummed. Not hot and noisy, but warm and low, like a song remembered by sleepy kitchens.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 9

readAloudText.Wonder: A puff of moonsteam escapes and curls into a smiling cloud.
readAloudText.Explore: When Coco opened the oven door a crack, moonsteam curled out and made a small cloud face that smiled before floating away.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 10

readAloudText.Wonder: The muffin looks too plain, so Luma brushes it with honeyed moonlight.
readAloudText.Explore: The muffin was round, but pale. Luma brushed it with honeyed moonlight until it shone like a cozy window.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 11

readAloudText.Wonder: Nib carries the muffin on a silver tray to the rooftop cooling rail.
readAloudText.Explore: Nib held the tray with both wings. Coco walked beside him. Luma followed slowly so the warm glow would not spill.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 12

readAloudText.Wonder: Coco rings the tiny bakery bell, inviting Button Moon to sniff the treat.
readAloudText.Explore: Coco rang the bakery bell once. The sound floated upward. Button Moon leaned a little closer, round and curious.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 13

readAloudText.Wonder: Button Moon smiles brighter, and the bakery fills with golden light.
readAloudText.Explore: The moon smiled. Golden light poured over the counter, the pans, the flour sacks, and every sleepy crumb.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 14

readAloudText.Wonder: The friends share the extra star-sprinkles with the smallest stars.
readAloudText.Explore: Nib opened the basket again. Together they sprinkled the rest into the sky for the smallest stars that had waited so politely.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Button Moon Bakery, page 15

readAloudText.Wonder: The bakery closes with one warm muffin glow left in the window.
readAloudText.Explore: At last, Coco turned the sign to sleeping without any words at all. One muffin glow stayed in the window, lighting the night softly home.
